/usr/bin/ar qc libepiscan_core.a CMakeFiles/episcan_core.dir/src/app/ScannerEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/episcan_core.dir/src/analyzer/UnsafeFunctionDetector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/episcan_core.dir/src/analyzer/InjectionDetector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/episcan_core.dir/src/analyzer/CryptoDetector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/episcan_core.dir/src/analyzer/VulnDetector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/episcan_core.dir/src/analyzer/CodeParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/episcan_core.dir/src/core/Vulnerability.cpp.o CMakeFiles/episcan_core.dir/src/core/Severity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/episcan_core.dir/src/core/Report.cpp.o CMakeFiles/episcan_core.dir/src/core/Config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/episcan_core.dir/src/core/Cvss.cpp.o CMakeFiles/episcan_core.dir/src/core/Metrics.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libepiscan_core.a
